hooks.command: for b in bash /bin/bash /usr/bin/bash /usr/local/bin/bash /opt/homebrew/bin/bash; do command -v "$b" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$b" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/python-launcher.sh" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/run.py" skills/token-optimizer/scripts/read_cache.py --quiet; done; exit 0
